title: PE10 0DN, ENICOR LIMITED: environmental permit issued - EPR/FB3607HE/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: ENICOR LIMITED   Installation name: ENICOR Limited   Permit number: EPR/FB3607HE/V006   "
